title: Open Field Test Protocol for Mice
author: Ana Catarina Carapinha Cascalho
materials: Upload your protocol OR make a new protocol.
Define the video sources (4) and apparatus.

steps.title: Place the mice in the testing...
steps.instruction: Place the mice in the testing room in their home cages for approximately 00:10:00 to acclimate. Leave the room during the acclimation period. For practicality you can acclimate the mice per cage (e.g. place mice from the same cage together in one open field arena - do not combine mice from different cages!).

steps.title: Return to the testing room and...
steps.instruction: Return to the testing room and turn on the activity chambers. Even though data are not being collected at this time, this will further mimic the testing environment.

steps.title: Gently remove each mouse from their...
steps.instruction: Gently remove each mouse from their home cage and immediately place them in the test chambers. If the activity chamber contains a center divider that divides the chamber into quadrants, place one mouse into each empty quadrant.

steps.title: Once all animals are loaded into the test chambers
steps.instruction: Once all animals are loaded into the test chambers. Leave the room during this acclimation time.

steps.title: After 00:10:00 , return to the...
steps.instruction: After 00:10:00 , return to the room and gently return each mouse to his or her respective home cage.

steps.title: Clean each chamber with disinfectant and paper towels
steps.instruction: Clean each chamber with disinfectant and paper towels. Ensure no dirt particles are left in the chamber. If multiple sessions are being run each day, thoroughly clean each test chamber in between each session with umonium. Only perform acclimation prior to the first round of testing to avoid habituation. In addition, randomly assign the animals to a new box each session. Track the box assignments throughout the duration of the study.

steps.title: Place the animals in the testing...
steps.instruction: Place the animals in the testing room for at least 00:30:00 for acclimatization.

steps.title: Start the computer and open the...
steps.instruction: Start the computer and open the ANY-maze tracking software (for more information of the ANY-maze software, go to: https://www.any-maze.com/) .

steps.title: Behaviour < Zones < Define the 3 zones
steps.instruction: Behaviour < Zones < Define the 3 zones: periphery, non-periphery and center. Periphery: Edge + 6.5 cm Center: 17.5 cm from the edge.

steps.title: Behaviour < Immobility detection
steps.instruction: Behaviour < Immobility detection: Set the immobility sensitivity at 70% and the minimum immobility period as 5s.

steps.title: Behaviour < Freezing detection
steps.instruction: Behaviour < Freezing detection: Set the minimum freezing detection as 5000 miliseconds.

steps.title: Testing < Stages < First stage
steps.instruction: Testing < Stages < First stage: fill in the test duration: 1800s.

steps.title: Go to the experiment tab and...
steps.instruction: Go to the experiment tab and fill in the number of animals per treatment that will be tested.

steps.title: Make sure the mice groups are...
steps.instruction: Make sure the mice groups are randomized and run intercalated to avoid hour/group interplay.

steps.title: Do not manipulate the mice before...
steps.instruction: Do not manipulate the mice before the test, simply move the mouse from the home cage to the testing chamber and identify the paw tattoo/ear tag after the test is performed.

steps.title: Move the animal directly to the open field testing box
steps.instruction: Move the animal directly to the open field testing box. If you have 4 open field boxes, move each mouse to a box.

steps.title: Go to the Tests tab and...
steps.instruction: Go to the Tests tab and press start all (All 4 mice will be tracked by the software and you can follow it on the screen). Remove yourself from the room or from the mice field of view to avoid interference and unnecessary noises that will interfere with the animal behavior.

steps.title: Clean the testing box and repeat...
steps.instruction: Clean the testing box and repeat steps 10-14 for the next mice. If the mouse is to be tested throughout the study avoid measuring the same animal more than once a month to avoid habituation. Randomize order of mice each day to avoid daytime influence.

steps.title: When the 30min are finished the...
steps.instruction: When the 30min are finished the software will automatically stop tracking the animal. Move the tested mouse to a new cage if non-tested mice are still present in the original cage.
